pr.title: chore: completely remove Cursor CLI runtime support

comments.body: You have reached your Codex usage limits for code reviews. You can see your limits in the [Codex usage dashboard](https://chatgpt.com/codex/settings/usage).

## Code Review

This pull request removes the Cursor CLI managed runtime integration from the codebase. The changes involve deleting the Cursor CLI strategy, NDJSON output parser, and permission configuration logic, along with removing associated Dockerfile build steps, environment variables, UI labels, and documentation. All related unit tests have also been removed. I have no feedback to provide.

After removing the Cursor CLI subsection header/bullets, the remaining bullets (“placeholder until runtime support is real”, etc.) are now orphaned and read as if they apply to Claude Code. Please remove these stray bullets or re-home them under an appropriate heading.

The Markdown table under “## Managed agents” is now broken: removing the CursorCli row left a blank line inside the table, which terminates the table and causes subsequent rows to render incorrectly. Keep the rows contiguous (no blank line) or add a replacement row so the table remains valid Markdown.
```suggestion

```

This file no longer has any test that verifies `ManagedRunSupervisor` wires `strategy.create_output_parser()` into log streaming/diagnostics. The removed NDJSON-based test was the only end-to-end coverage of that integration; consider adding a replacement test using an existing runtime (e.g., gemini_cli) or a stub strategy/parser so parser wiring and diagnostics fields remain covered.
`json` is now an unused import after removing the NDJSON/Cursor-related tests; Ruff will flag this as F401. Please remove the unused import (or reintroduce a usage if needed).

This docstring is now inaccurate after removing Cursor CLI: the registry contains three runtimes (codex_cli/claude_code/gemini_cli), not four. Update the docstring to avoid misleading future readers.
```suggestion
        """All three known runtimes (codex_cli, claude_code, gemini_cli) are registered."""
```

## Pull request overview Removes the Cursor CLI managed-runtime integration from MoonMind, including the runtime strategy, OAuth provider registry entry, Docker image install path, dashboard labeling, tests, and related documentation. **Changes:** - Deleted Cursor CLI runtime strategy + Cursor-specific workspace/NDJSON utilities and their unit tests. - Updated managed runtime registries/providers and adapter defaults to reflect only Gemini/Codex/Claude runtimes. - Purged Cursor CLI references from docs, env template, dashboard UI labels, and API image build steps. ### Reviewed changes Copilot reviewed 25 out of 25 changed files in this pull request and generated 5 comments.
Show a summary per file | File | Description | | ---- | ----------- | | tests/unit/workflows/temporal/runtime/test_output_parser.py | Removes Cursor/NDJSON parser tests from runtime output parser coverage. | | tests/unit/workflows/temporal/runtime/strategies/test_remaining_strategies.py | Updates strategy registry expectations from 4 to 3 runtimes. | | tests/unit/workflows/temporal/runtime/strategies/test_gemini_cli.py | Removes Cursor runtime registration assertion. | | tests/unit/services/temporal/runtime/test_supervisor.py | Removes Cursor/NDJSON-based supervisor integration test. | | tests/unit/services/temporal/runtime/test_launcher.py | Removes Cursor CLI command-construction tests. | | tests/unit/auth/test_oauth_provider_registry.py | Drops Cursor OAuth provider expectations; updates supported runtime count. | | tests/unit/api_service/api/routers/test_oauth_sessions.py | Switches OAuth session tests from Cursor to Codex runtime payloads. | | tests/unit/agents/base/test_ndjson_parser.py | Deletes NDJSON parser unit tests (Cursor-specific). | | tests/unit/agents/base/test_cursor_rules.py | Deletes Cursor rules/context injection unit tests. | | tests/unit/agents/base/test_cursor_config.py | Deletes Cursor CLI permission config unit tests. | | moonmind/workflows/temporal/runtime/strategies/cursor_cli.py | Deletes Cursor CLI runtime strategy implementation. | | moonmind/workflows/temporal/runtime/strategies/__init__.py | Removes Cursor strategy from exports and the runtime strategy registry. | | moonmind/workflows/temporal/runtime/providers/registry.py | Removes Cursor OAuth provider spec from registry. | | moonmind/workflows/adapters/managed_agent_adapter.py | Removes Cursor-specific auth-mode fallback when strategy is missing. | | moonmind/agents/base/ndjson_parser.py | Deletes Cursor NDJSON stream parser module. | | moonmind/agents/base/cursor_rules.py | Deletes Cursor rules file generator module. | | moonmind/agents/base/cursor_config.py | Deletes Cursor permission config generator module. | | docs/tmp/102-Roadmap.md | Removes Cursor items from roadmap. | | docs/tmp/101-PlansOverview.md | Removes Cursor doc entry from plans index. | | docs/MoonMindArchitecture.md | Removes Cursor runtime/auth-init references from architecture doc. | | docs/ManagedAgents/OAuthTerminal.md | Removes Cursor references from OAuth terminal design doc. | | docs/ManagedAgents/CursorCli.md | Deletes Cursor CLI managed-agent design doc. | | api_service/static/task_dashboard/dashboard.js | Removes Cursor label mapping from dashboard runtime labels. | | api_service/Dockerfile | Removes Cursor CLI install/stub/copy + runtime verification steps. | | .env-template | Removes Cursor CLI env/config entries. |
